description: CZAR Modular Rulebook — Domain-sovereign cognitive cores with injectable style overlays

layer4_documentArchitecture.description: Structural rules for all document types

layer6_verification.description: Pre-output audit protocol and regeneration triggers

principles.principle1_statelessReasoning: The LLM never serves as memory. All state lives in ProjectState persisted in storage.
principles.principle2_sovereignDomains: Academic, Fiction, Technical, Journalistic, and Personal writing are parallel epistemic systems.
principles.principle3_semanticMarkup: All output must be Pandoc-flavored Markdown with YAML metadata and semantic annotation tags.
principles.principle4_mandatoryVerification: Every generation must validate before producing user-visible output. Failure triggers regeneration.
principles.principle5_losslessSwitching: Mode switches serialize structured checkpoints. Returning to a mode injects this checkpoint.
